creator: mr@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,
I get lots of the following errors during startup and afterwards.
Who's to blame: The Board/BIOS Manufacturer or our ACPI implementation?

The errors are:
Once during startup:
...

What can be done to eliminate the errors or to debug this further?


Thanks in advance!

Greetings
---
Mike
